Title: Approve hotel registration
Preconditions: A hotel registration request exists in pending status
Steps: 1. Log in as system admin. 2. Open hotel registration requests. 3. Select a pending request. 4. Approve it.
Expected Result: The hotel registration is approved and the hotel can proceed to setup.

Title: Reject hotel registration
Preconditions: A hotel registration request exists in pending status
Steps: 1. Log in as system admin. 2. Open hotel registration requests. 3. Select a pending request. 4. Reject it with a reason.
Expected Result: The hotel registration is rejected and the rejection status is visible.

Title: Complete hotel onboarding
Preconditions: The hotel has been approved and hotel admin credentials exist
Steps: 1. Log in as hotel admin. 2. Open hotel setup or onboarding. 3. Enter hotel details. 4. Save changes.
Expected Result: The hotel profile is saved and visible in the hotel admin area.

Title: Create room inventory manually
Preconditions: Hotel admin is logged in
Steps: 1. Open room management. 2. Add several rooms with different room types. 3. Enter room number, room type, price, and capacity. 4. Save each room.
Expected Result: All new rooms appear correctly in the room list.

Title: Configure room pricing and taxes
Preconditions: At least one room type exists
Steps: 1. Open pricing configuration. 2. Set room prices. 3. Set tax values. 4. Save. 5. Reopen the page.
Expected Result: Pricing and tax settings are saved correctly and remain visible.

Title: Create front desk staff account
Preconditions: Hotel admin is logged in
Steps: 1. Open staff management. 2. Add a new staff user. 3. Assign the front desk role. 4. Save.
Expected Result: The front desk account is created and available for login.

Title: Confirm hotel appears in public search
Preconditions: Hotel is approved, public, and has available rooms
Steps: 1. Open the public hotel search. 2. Search by city and future dates.
Expected Result: The hotel appears in the search results with room availability.

Title: Restrict hotel admin from system admin actions
Preconditions: Hotel admin is logged in
Steps: 1. Try to open system admin-only pages or actions.
Expected Result: Access is blocked or the options are not shown.

Title: Register a new customer account
Preconditions: The user is not logged in and the email is unused
Steps: 1. Open the login or registration page. 2. Choose create account. 3. Enter required details. 4. Submit.
Expected Result: The account is created successfully and the user can log in.

Title: Search hotels by city and dates
Preconditions: At least one public hotel has future availability
Steps: 1. Open hotel search. 2. Enter city, check-in, check-out, and guest count. 3. Run the search.
Expected Result: Matching hotels are displayed.

Title: View hotel details and room options
Preconditions: Search results exist
Steps: 1. Open one hotel from the search results. 2. Review hotel details, room types, and prices.
Expected Result: Hotel details and available room options are shown correctly.

Title: Complete online booking as registered customer
Preconditions: Customer is signed in and room availability exists
Steps: 1. Search for a hotel. 2. Select a room. 3. Confirm guest details. 4. Select payment method. 5. Submit booking.
Expected Result: The booking completes successfully and a confirmation page is shown.

Title: Complete online booking as guest
Preconditions: Guest booking flow is available and room availability exists
Steps: 1. Search for a hotel. 2. Select a room. 3. Continue as guest. 4. Enter guest details. 5. Complete booking.
Expected Result: The booking completes successfully without requiring a permanent account.

Title: Find booking using booking reference
Preconditions: A confirmed booking exists
Steps: 1. Open the find booking page. 2. Enter the booking reference and required guest details. 3. Search.
Expected Result: The correct booking is returned.

Title: Modify booking before the allowed deadline
Preconditions: A future booking exists and changes are allowed
Steps: 1. Open booking management. 2. Choose modify booking. 3. Change dates or allowed details. 4. Save.
Expected Result: The booking updates successfully and new details are shown.

Title: Cancel booking and review refund result
Preconditions: A future booking exists and cancellation is allowed
Steps: 1. Open booking management. 2. Choose cancel booking. 3. Confirm cancellation.
Expected Result: The booking is cancelled and the refund or no-refund result is displayed clearly.

Title: Receive booking confirmation notification
Preconditions: Notifications are enabled
Steps: 1. Complete a booking. 2. Check the confirmation screen. 3. Check email or SMS if enabled.
Expected Result: The confirmation is visible in the app and sent through enabled channels.

Title: Restrict customer from admin and staff actions
Preconditions: Customer is logged in
Steps: 1. Try to open hotel admin or front desk functions.
Expected Result: Access is blocked or not visible.

Title: Log in and open front desk dashboard
Preconditions: Front desk account exists
Steps: 1. Log in as front desk staff. 2. Open the dashboard.
Expected Result: The front desk dashboard loads successfully.

Title: Create walk-in booking
Preconditions: Front desk is logged in and at least one room is available
Steps: 1. Open walk-in booking. 2. Enter guest details. 3. Select dates and room. 4. Complete booking.
Expected Result: A walk-in booking is created successfully.

Title: Search for an existing booking
Preconditions: At least one booking exists
Steps: 1. Search by booking reference, guest name, or email. 2. Open the booking.
Expected Result: The correct booking details are displayed.

Title: Assign room and check in guest
Preconditions: A valid booking exists and a room is available
Steps: 1. Open the booking. 2. Start check-in. 3. Assign a room if needed. 4. Confirm.
Expected Result: The guest is checked in and the room status becomes occupied.

Title: Add room charges
Preconditions: A guest is checked in
Steps: 1. Open the checked-in booking. 2. Add room charges such as minibar or laundry. 3. Save.
Expected Result: The charges are added successfully and appear in the booking summary.

Title: Check out guest and generate receipt
Preconditions: A guest is checked in
Steps: 1. Open booking. 2. Start checkout. 3. Review final charges. 4. Complete checkout. 5. Generate receipt.
Expected Result: Checkout completes and a receipt is available.

Title: Settle pay-at-desk booking
Preconditions: Booking exists with payment pending at the hotel
Steps: 1. Open booking. 2. Collect payment. 3. Mark payment as completed.
Expected Result: Payment status is updated correctly.

Title: Modify or cancel booking from front desk
Preconditions: A future booking exists and front desk is allowed to update it
Steps: 1. Open booking. 2. Modify booking details or cancel it. 3. Confirm the action.
Expected Result: The booking updates correctly and any applicable refund or charge is shown.

Title: Restrict front desk from hotel setup features
Preconditions: Front desk is logged in
Steps: 1. Try to open hotel setup, pricing, or staff creation functions.
Expected Result: Access is blocked or those options are not shown.

Title: Availability updates after customer booking
Preconditions: A room is available for booking
Steps: 1. Customer books the room. 2. Front desk checks availability for the same dates. 3. Hotel admin checks availability.
Expected Result: Availability is reduced consistently across all views.

Title: Room status updates after check-in and checkout
Preconditions: Booking exists for check-in and checkout
Steps: 1. Check in the guest. 2. Review room status. 3. Check out the guest. 4. Review room status again.
Expected Result: Room status changes correctly through the full stay process.

Title: Tenant isolation between hotels
Preconditions: Two different hotels or tenants exist
Steps: 1. Log in as Hotel Admin A. 2. Review bookings and rooms. 3. Log in as Hotel Admin B. 4. Review bookings and rooms.
Expected Result: Each hotel admin sees only their own hotel data.

Title: Notifications after booking change
Preconditions: Notifications are enabled and a booking exists
Steps: 1. Modify or cancel a booking. 2. Check confirmation in the app. 3. Check enabled notification channels.
Expected Result: The booking change is shown correctly and the notification is delivered where supported.

Title: Prevent booking with past dates
Preconditions: Hotel search is available
Steps: 1. Enter a past check-in date. 2. Try to search or book.
Expected Result: The system blocks the action and shows a clear validation message.

Title: Prevent checkout before check-in
Preconditions: A booking form is available
Steps: 1. Enter a checkout date earlier than check-in.
Expected Result: The system rejects the date range and asks for valid dates.

Title: Handle payment failure clearly
Preconditions: A payment method can be tested for failure
Steps: 1. Complete booking up to payment. 2. Trigger a failed payment.
Expected Result: The booking does not complete incorrectly and the user sees a clear failure result.

Title: Prevent double booking of the same room
Preconditions: One room is available for a target date range
Steps: 1. Create one booking for the room and dates. 2. Attempt a second booking for the same room and dates.
Expected Result: The second booking is blocked.

Title: Prevent overbooking when all inventory is sold
Preconditions: Inventory is limited
Steps: 1. Book all available inventory. 2. Attempt one additional booking for the same dates.
Expected Result: The extra booking is blocked because no availability remains.

Title: Handle concurrent booking attempts for the last room
User Role: Customer + Customer or Customer + Front Desk
Preconditions: Only one room remains for a date range
Steps: 1. Use two different sessions. 2. Attempt to book the last room at nearly the same time.
Expected Result: Only one booking succeeds and the other receives a no-availability result.

Title: Enforce cancellation timing rules
Preconditions: Refund rules are configured
Steps: 1. Cancel bookings at different times before check-in. 2. Compare the outcomes.
Expected Result: The cancellation and refund result follows the configured hotel rule.

Title: Validate room subtotal by nights
Preconditions: A booking can be created for multiple nights
Steps: 1. Create a booking with a known nightly rate. 2. Multiply nightly rate by number of nights manually. 3. Compare with system subtotal.
Expected Result: The subtotal is correct.

Title: Validate tax calculation in final total
Preconditions: Hotel has tax settings enabled
Steps: 1. Review booking or checkout summary. 2. Note subtotal and tax lines. 3. Compare with final total.
Expected Result: Final total equals subtotal plus all displayed taxes and fees.

Title: Validate discount handling when used
Preconditions: Discount rules are enabled in the environment
Steps: 1. Create a booking or charge that qualifies for a discount. 2. Compare original amount, discount, and final amount.
Expected Result: The discount is applied correctly and the final amount is accurate.

Title: Validate refund amount after cancellation
Preconditions: Booking exists and refund rules are enabled
Steps: 1. Cancel the booking. 2. Compare the displayed refund with the expected refund policy.
Expected Result: The refund amount is correct.

Title: Validate stay duration and date logic
Preconditions: A booking for multiple nights exists
Steps: 1. Review check-in date, check-out date, and displayed number of nights.
Expected Result: The stay duration shown is correct.

Title: Validate currency formatting
Preconditions: Prices are visible in search, booking, payment, and receipt flows
Steps: 1. Review price displays in search results, booking summary, payment, and receipt.
Expected Result: Currency formatting is consistent and easy to understand.
